title: Strengthen Content Security Policy
description: Content-Security-Policy (CSP) header mitigates XSS attacks by restricting which resources can be loaded.
nginx: add_header Content-Security-Policy "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'" always;
apache: Header always set Content-Security-Policy "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'"
